doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: The document's structure and Rule 5.5 topic are authentic, but subsection (b)'s detailed prohibition on non-lawyer activities and subsection (c)'s "no recognized emergency exception" language appear to exceed or misrepresent the actual ABA
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The document's structure and Rule 5.5 topic are authentic, but subsection (b)'s detailed prohibition on non-lawyer activities and subsection (c)'s "no recognized emergency exception" language appear to exceed or misrepresent the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which primarily addresses lawyer conduct rather than prescriptive non-lawyer restrictions.
